mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qp_rule_meta (version_id, term_type, category_id, category_name, brand_id, brand_name, brand_name_en, model_id, model_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at) SELECT #{newVersionId}, term_type, category_id, category_name, brand_id, brand_name, brand_name_en, model_id, model_name, enabled, NOW(), NOW() FROM qp_rule_meta WHERE version_id = #{baseVersionId}
